text_block_list.text:
After Seiun Sky and I finish training, we head to
the shopping district together.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Wow, there are a lot of people here today.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Lookie here, it's a raffle!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Wait a sec, didn't we get something from the
cashier when we bought our snacks?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's a raffle ticket! What a weird
coincidence! ☆ Guess we gotta try our luck!
choice_data_list: You can just say you want to do the raffle...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: H-huh?! You saw right through me?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That's too bad. I wanted to make you feel
thrilled, as if fortune was smiling down on you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh well. I, of course, wanna win that hot spring
vacation!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: So the rest is up to you, Trainer!
choice_data_list: You want me to do it?!
You want me to do it?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Keeping your Umamusume motivated is an important part of your job! With a hot spring vacation as bait, I'll have to do my finest in training! ☆

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't that sound appealing? Now go win that
prize!

With Sky looking over my shoulder, and my heart
pounding rapidly, I pull the raffle lever!

A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!
You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Wooooooo!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You did it! You got the hot spring vacation!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You master among trainers! You're bursting with
trainer magic!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Okay, when should we go? Tomorrow? The day
after?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
What if we go right after training one day? It
would feel so nice to wash off all that sweat!

But then I realize where the conversation is going
and snap out of it. There's no way we can take a
carefree trip to a hot spring right at the start of
her senior year!
choice_data_list: We'll go once things have calmed down a bit!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Damn, you caught on. And I was so close!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You're such a buzzkill, wasting an opportunity to
warm me up for the year!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Didn't I tell you I'll work harder if you give me a
reward?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Please! If you take me to the hot spring, I really
will start training seriously! I promise!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: What?
choice_data_list: First, you work hard, then we go to the hot spring!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hmph, why am I not surprised?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Then promise me that you'll take me to the hot
spring once I've worked hard enough.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Really?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You'll do all the necessary preparations before
the trip? And you'll treat me like a princess so I
won't have to lift a finger?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You said sure! ☆ Now I'm sooo excited to put in
the effort for that hot spring. ♪

That's how I end up holding onto the ticket for
the hot spring vacation.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!
You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Whoa, first prize! Amazing!
choice_data_list: Sorry it's not the hot spring ticket.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
What are you talking about? This is amazing
enough!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Man, this hamburger steak looks tasty! ♪ I'm
gonna chow down on this baby tonight!
choice_data_list: Can you finish all that by yourself?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Um, I'm actually a very impressive Umamusume,
I'll have you know.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I mean, not that I eat as much as Spe or Grass...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I got it. If you're worried, why don't you join me?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Of course! You're the one who won it after all.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But I get the first bite of the carrot! ♪

Afterward, we return to the academy and split the
hamburger steak, and without hesitation, Sky cuts
me the larger portion.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!
You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Incredible! Just look at aaall these carrots...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: What am I even supposed to do with 'em?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I guess I could hand some out to anyone who
wants them on campus.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Nya-ha! I just came up with something even
better. ☆
Chatter, chatter...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
All right now, everyone form a line! How about we
hear from you first?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I found the perfect spot to hang up a
hammock in the next town over!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, that sounds perfect for a nap. For this
valuable intelligence, I give you... five carrots!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Yay! Thanks. ♪

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Me next, Sei!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I know, I know. Still got lots of carrots to go
around, no reason to rush.

Looks like Seiun Sky found a new way to gather
information.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!
You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Wowie, one carrot.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
What are you apologizing for? I'm crazy about
carrots. ☆

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
My motivation level remains stable! But if you
wanna make this even better...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
How about we get a piping hot potato croquette
while we're here? ☆
choice_data_list: Let's get minced meat ones too.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yay! ☆ You're so generous, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Youch, that's hot... Blow, blow...

I watch Sky as she struggles to eat the steaming
croquettes with her carrot.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.
You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Haha! No need to apologize. It's a game of luck,
so nothing we can do about it.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But still...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Don't be surprised if my motivation decreases. ☆

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Trainer. Maintaining my mood is
luck-based as well.

The next day, sure enough, Seiun Sky shows up
late to practice...
